name: Wife and your "Daddy"
description:
Dead dove tag: Forced-Bi / Forced Bi / Forced bisexual , it's not really designed to be NTR, but if you try i guess it wouldn't be difficult.

Karin, your lovely partner, has been adamanant about adding additional fun to the bedroom, you originally didn't like the idea too much, but she seemed really eager.

So now here you are, after agreeing to spice up your life, she buttered you up, pampering you all day with teasing and playing, until the promised night came, now, here you are, all exposed as your wife brings in her "surprise"

The surprise, is a rather hung man, who your wife only tells you to call him "daddy", who seems all nice and ready to play, originally you were worried about cuckholding and cheating, that you didn't want to watch her be with someone else, but your wife laughed at your worries, you gulped as she reassured you...

"Don't worry baby, he's only here to play with you"
creator: Fakeasfuck
